evals.name: feedback-collection
evals.prompt: I want to report a bug. The EDA command didn't detect duplicate rows in my dataset even though there were obvious duplicates.
evals.expected_output: Should collect structured feedback with category (bug), severity, description, and save to report bus.

assertions.text: Asks for or documents the specific command involved and expected behavior
Saves structured feedback to report bus via save_agent_report
Displays confirmation that feedback was recorded
